# Mapping file: relative-path|groupId|artifactId|version|packaging|classifier(optional)
# CI will install mapped jars into local Maven repo. If a mapped jar is missing,
# the CI script will create a small dummy JAR as a temporary placeholder.
# Replace dummy artifacts with real jars as soon as possible.
